storyBeat: 洞穴村莊的孤女 — 後母會一直這樣?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的故事要認識 4 個字：
🔑 village = 村
🔑 wife = 妻
🔑 own = 自己的
🔑 hard = 辛苦
記住這 4 個字，葉限的故事就好聽懂了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago in southern China, a girl named 葉限 (Yexian) lived in a cave village.
questions.explanationZh: 好久好久以前，在中國南方，有個叫葉限的女孩，住在一個洞穴村莊裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each phrase with its Chinese meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 這 4 個片語都是葉限日常的縮影——洞穴村莊、扛水、溫柔的話、辛苦的活。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her mother died when she was small. Her father died too.
questions.explanationZh: 她很小的時候，媽媽就不在了；後來，爸爸也走了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The new wife gave her own daughter soft food and warm clothes.
questions.questionEn: Did the new wife treat Yexian the same way?
questions.explanationZh: 好東西都給自己的孩子——葉限呢？當然不一樣。答 No，後母對她不一樣。
questions.sentenceZh: 後母把軟的食物、暖的衣服，都留給自己的女兒。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago in southern China, a girl named Yexian ___ in a cave village.
questions.sentenceZh: 好久好久以前，在中國南方，有個叫葉限的女孩，住在一個洞穴村莊裡。
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh: 故事發生在「很久以前」——用過去式 lived 喔。live → lived，就像 walk → walked 一樣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each day, Yexian carried water up the hill and washed dishes by the well.
questions.explanationZh: 每天，葉限扛著水桶爬上山坡，再蹲在井邊把碗盤一個個洗乾淨。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She worked from when the sun rose until the moon came out.
questions.question: How long did she work each day?
questions.explanationZh: 太陽升起開始，月亮出來才停——這就是「從早做到晚」，一整天沒停過。
questions.sentenceZh: 她從太陽升起就開始做事，一直到月亮出來才能停。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The new wife gave her own daughter soft food and warm clothes, but made Yexian carry water up the hill every day.
questions.sentenceZh: 後母把軟食物、暖衣服都留給自己女兒，卻讓葉限每天爬山扛水。
questions.question: What does this tell us about the new wife?
questions.explanationZh: 好的給自己女兒，辛苦的全推給葉限——這就是「只對葉限殘忍」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did she feel about her days?
questions.question: How did she feel each day?
questions.explanationZh: 一個人扛水、一個人洗碗——當然是「孤單又累」。
questions.sentenceZh: 她覺得每一天怎麼樣？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Year after year, no one in the cave village spoke a kind word to her.
questions.explanationZh: 一年又一年，洞穴村莊裡沒有一個人對她說過一句溫柔的話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Year after year, no one in the cave village spoke a kind word to her.
questions.sentenceZh: 一年又一年，洞穴村莊裡沒有一個人對她說過一句溫柔的話。
questions.questionEn: Did anyone in the village care about Yexian?
questions.explanationZh: 一句溫柔的話也沒有——整個村子裡，沒有人在乎她。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The new wife only smiled at her own child.
questions.question: Who got the new wife's smiles?
questions.explanationZh: 笑只留給自己孩子——後母的笑，給的是「她自己的女兒」。
questions.sentenceZh: 後母只對自己的孩子笑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yexian carried buckets, washed pots, and slept on a thin straw mat in the corner.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
questions.explanationZh: 扛水、洗碗、睡草蓆——這就是她每一天的「辛苦日常」。
questions.sentenceZh: 葉限扛桶子、洗鍋碗，晚上睡在角落一張薄薄的草蓆上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each day, Yexian carried water up the hill and washed dishes by the well.
questions.sentenceZh: 每天，葉限扛著水桶爬上山坡，再蹲在井邊把碗盤一個個洗乾淨。
questions.question: Which image matches this sentence?
questions.explanationZh: 扛水桶爬山——就是「扛著重水桶爬山」這幅畫面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: And every night, she gave Yexian all the hard work, again and again...
questions.explanationZh: 每個晚上，所有辛苦的活，一樣都不少地壓在葉限身上，一次又一次……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her mother died when she was small. Her father died too.
questions.sentenceZh: 她很小的時候，媽媽就不在了；後來，爸爸也走了。
questions.question: Why was Yexian alone in the world?
options: she moved to a new city
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽走了、爸爸也走了——她孤單，是因為「父母都不在了」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She worked from when the sun rose until the moon came out.
questions.sentenceZh: 她從太陽升起就開始做事，一直到月亮出來才能停。
questions.questionEn: Did Yexian have time to rest during the day?
questions.explanationZh: 從日出做到月出——整天都沒停。答 No，她沒有休息的時間。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The new wife only smiled at her own child.
questions.sentenceZh: 後母只對自己的孩子笑。
questions.question: What does this tell us about how Yexian felt?
questions.explanationZh: 後母只對自己孩子笑，從不看葉限一眼——當然讓她覺得「孤單又被排斥」。

storyBeat: 池塘裡的紅鰭魚 — 牠不只是魚?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚要認識 4 個字：
🔑 friend = 朋友
🔑 pond = 池塘
🔑 fin = 鰭
🔑 tame = 溫馴
記住這 4 個字，今晚的故事就好跟了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Behind the cave village was a small quiet pond.
questions.explanationZh: 洞穴村莊後面，藏著一個安靜的小池塘。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each phrase with its Chinese meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 這 4 個片語都跟那條神奇的魚有關——紅鰭、金眼睛、米飯碎屑、光滑的身體。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No one in the village ever walked down to the pond.
questions.questionEn: Could Yexian keep a secret there?
questions.explanationZh: 沒有人來這裡——那葉限當然可以把自己的小祕密藏在這裡！答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 村裡沒有人會走到池塘來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In the water lived a fish with bright 紅鰭 (red fins) and golden eyes.
questions.explanationZh: 水裡住著一條魚，長著火紅的鰭，還有一雙金色的眼睛。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each morning, Yexian dropped rice crumbs onto the still water. The fish swam up to her hand and let her touch its smooth side.
questions.sentenceZh: 每天早晨，葉限把米飯的碎屑撒在平靜的水面上。那條魚游過來，靠近她的手，讓她摸摸牠光滑滑的身體。
questions.question: What do these details show about the fish?
questions.explanationZh: 讓她摸、游到她手邊——這條魚是「完全信任葉限」的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each morning, Yexian dropped rice crumbs onto the still water.
questions.question: What did Yexian bring to the pond?
questions.explanationZh: 米屑就是食物——她每天帶「食物」來餵魚。
questions.sentenceZh: 每天早晨，葉限把米飯的碎屑撒在平靜的水面上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The fish swam up to her hand and let her touch its smooth side.
questions.explanationZh: 那條魚游過來，靠近她的手，讓她摸摸牠光滑滑的身體。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Day by day, the fish grew longer than her two arms put together.
questions.sentenceZh: 一天天過去，魚長得比她兩隻手臂張開還要長。
questions.questionEn: Was the fish getting smaller over time?
questions.explanationZh: 越長越大，比兩手張開還要長——當然不是越來越小！答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What kind of fish was it?
questions.question: What kind of fish was it?
questions.explanationZh: 紅鰭、金眼，還讓人摸——這條魚「亮麗又溫馴」。
questions.sentenceZh: 那是一條怎樣的魚？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Day by day, the fish grew longer than her two arms put together.
questions.question: How did the fish change?
questions.explanationZh: 比兩手張開還長——牠「越來越大」。
questions.sentenceZh: 一天天過去，魚長得比她兩隻手臂張開還要長。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In the water lived a fish with bright red fins and golden eyes.
questions.sentenceZh: 水裡住著一條魚，長著火紅的鰭，還有一雙金色的眼睛。
questions.question: Which image matches this fish?
options: bright fish, red fins, gold eyes
a flat grey stone in the water
questions.explanationZh: 紅鰭、金眼睛——就是「亮麗魚，紅鰭金眼」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The village was loud and cold. Yexian sat by the pond, and the fish came up to her hand.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: a secret friendship by the water
a busy market day in town
a stormy night of heavy rain
questions.explanationZh: 只有她知道這個池塘，只有魚願意靠近她——這就是「水邊的祕密友誼」。
questions.sentenceZh: 村莊吵鬧又冷漠，但葉限坐在池邊，魚就游到她手邊來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But the new wife was watching from behind the rocks.
questions.explanationZh: 但是，後母就躲在石頭後面，偷偷地看著這一切。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But the new wife was watching from behind the rocks. Her eyes did not blink.
questions.sentenceZh: 但是，後母就躲在石頭後面，偷偷地看著這一切。她眼睛一眨也不眨。
questions.question: What is the new wife likely planning?
questions.explanationZh: 躲在石頭後面偷看、眼睛不眨——這個神情，八成是在打「那條魚的壞主意」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her eyes did not blink. Something cold and slow turned inside her chest...
questions.explanationZh: 她眼睛一眨也不眨。胸口裡，有什麼又冷又慢的東西，正在慢慢地轉……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No one in the village ever walked down to the pond.
questions.sentenceZh: 村裡沒有人會走到池塘來。
questions.questionEn: Was the pond a secret place for Yexian?
questions.explanationZh: 沒人來——那這裡就是葉限的秘密地方。答 Yes。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The village was loud and cold. Yexian sat by the pond, and the fish came up to her hand.
questions.sentenceZh: 村莊吵鬧又冷漠，但葉限坐在池邊，魚就游到她手邊來。
questions.question: Why was the pond important to Yexian?
options: it was the one warm place she had
it had the best drinking water
the new wife often came there
she could catch fish to sell
optionsZh: 那是她唯一溫暖的地方
questions.explanationZh: 村子冷漠，但池邊有魚靠近她——那裡是她「唯一溫暖的地方」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her eyes did not blink. Something cold and slow turned inside her chest.
questions.sentenceZh: 她眼睛一眨也不眨。胸口裡，有什麼又冷又慢的東西，正在慢慢地轉……
questions.questionEn: Was the new wife feeling kind and happy?
questions.explanationZh: 眼睛不眨、心裡有什麼冷冷的東西在轉——她心裡可不是什麼好感受。答 No。

storyBeat: 池塘空了 — 葉限會發現嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚要認識 4 個字：
🔑 torn = 破舊
🔑 dress = 衣服
🔑 knife = 刀
🔑 empty = 空的
記住這 4 個字，今晚的故事就好聽懂了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One morning, 後母 (the new wife) put on Yexian's torn dress.
questions.explanationZh: 一個早晨，後母穿上葉限那件破破舊舊的衣服。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each phrase with its Chinese meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 這 4 個片語是這節故事的重點——破舊的衣服、寬袖子、魚湯、空空的池塘。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She hid a small bright knife inside her wide sleeve.
questions.questionEn: Did she want to be kind to the fish?
questions.explanationZh: 去池塘還帶著刀——這哪裡是去餵魚的？答 No，她沒安好心。
questions.sentenceZh: 她把一把小亮刀藏進寬袖子裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She walked down to the pond and called softly, like Yexian always did.
questions.explanationZh: 她走到池邊，像葉限平時那樣，輕輕地呼喚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The new wife put on Yexian's torn dress. She hid a small bright knife inside her wide sleeve.
questions.sentenceZh: 後母穿上葉限那件破破舊舊的衣服。她把一把小亮刀藏進寬袖子裡。
questions.question: Why did the new wife wear Yexian's dress?
options: to trick the fish into coming up
because her own dress was dirty
to stay warm in the cold
questions.explanationZh: 魚認識葉限的味道——後母穿上那件衣服，是為了「騙魚游上來」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The fish swam up because the dress smelled the same.
questions.question: Why did the fish come up?
options: wanted to rest in the sun
questions.explanationZh: 聞到熟悉的葉限味道——魚以為「葉限來了」，才游上來的。
questions.sentenceZh: 魚游了上來，因為那件衣服聞起來味道一樣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: That night, the family ate fish soup. Yexian had no idea.
questions.explanationZh: 那天晚上，家裡喝魚湯。葉限坐在旁邊，一點都不知道發生了什麼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The fish swam up because the dress smelled the same.
questions.sentenceZh: 魚游了上來，因為那件衣服聞起來味道一樣。
questions.questionEn: Did the fish know it was being tricked?
questions.explanationZh: 魚以為葉限來了才游上來——牠根本不知道被騙了。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No one at the table said where the fish had come from.
questions.question: What did the family hide from Yexian?
questions.explanationZh: 沒人說魚從哪來——家裡瞞著葉限的，就是「魚從哪裡來的」。
questions.sentenceZh: 桌上沒有人說那條魚從哪裡來的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The next day, Yexian went to the pond. What did she see?
questions.question: What did she see at the pond?
questions.explanationZh: 魚被吃掉了——池裡只剩「空空的水」。
questions.sentenceZh: 隔天，葉限走到池塘去。她看到了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She sat at the edge and called the fish. No bright red moved in the water.
questions.sentenceZh: 她坐在池邊，一聲一聲呼喚那條魚。水裡，沒有任何紅色在動了。
questions.question: Which image matches this moment?
options: a girl sitting alone by an empty pool
a girl laughing at a market
a fish jumping high in the air
two girls playing by the water
optionsZh: 一個女孩獨自坐在空池旁
一個女孩在市集裡大笑
questions.explanationZh: 空空的水、孤獨的呼喚——「一個女孩獨自坐在空池旁」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She sat at the edge and called the fish. No bright red moved in the water.
questions.explanationZh: 她坐在池邊，一聲一聲呼喚那條魚。水裡，沒有任何紅色在動了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yexian sat by the empty pond. Her only friend was gone, and she did not know why.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
questions.explanationZh: 那條魚，是她在這世界上唯一的朋友——這段說的就是「葉限失去唯一的朋友」。
questions.sentenceZh: 葉限坐在空空的池邊。她唯一的朋友不見了，她不知道為什麼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: That night, the family ate fish soup. Yexian had no idea.
questions.sentenceZh: 那天晚上，家裡喝魚湯。葉限坐在旁邊，一點都不知道發生了什麼。
questions.question: How does this detail make the scene sadder?
options: Yexian ate her friend without knowing
the new wife was kind that night
the fish had already swum away
optionsZh: 葉限在不知情下吃了她的朋友
questions.explanationZh: 她的魚朋友被做成湯，她還懵懵的坐著喝——「在不知情下吃了她的朋友」，真的很悲。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her tears fell into the still water. Then — a sky-colored shadow moved on the other side...
questions.explanationZh: 她的眼淚落進靜靜的水裡。然後——對岸，出現了一個天藍色的影子，在動……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No one at the table said where the fish had come from.
questions.sentenceZh: 桌上沒有人說那條魚從哪裡來的。
questions.questionEn: Did the family tell Yexian the truth about the fish?
questions.explanationZh: 沒有人說魚從哪來——他們沒有告訴葉限真相。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yexian sat by the empty pond. Her only friend was gone, and she did not know why.
questions.sentenceZh: 葉限坐在空空的池邊。她唯一的朋友不見了，她不知道為什麼。
questions.question: What word best describes how Yexian felt?
questions.explanationZh: 唯一的朋友不見了、不知道為什麼——這種感覺，就是「心碎」呀。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her tears fell into the still water. Then a sky-colored shadow moved on the other side.
questions.sentenceZh: 她的眼淚落進靜靜的水裡。然後——對岸，出現了一個天藍色的影子，在動……
questions.questionEn: Was Yexian completely alone at the pond?
questions.explanationZh: 眼淚落水後，對岸出現了天藍色影子——她並不是一個人。答 No。

storyBeat: 老人與魚骨 — 骨頭能給她什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚要認識 4 個字：
🔑 robe = 長袍
🔑 cry = 哭
🔑 bone = 骨頭
🔑 dig = 挖
這幾個字很重要，記住了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: An 老人 (old man) in a sky-colored robe stepped down beside her.
questions.explanationZh: 一個穿著天藍色長袍的老人，走到她身邊，輕輕站定。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each phrase with its Chinese meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 這 4 個片語是這節故事的重點——天藍色長袍、濕草地、魚骨頭、薄草蓆。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His feet did not touch the wet grass by the pond.
questions.questionEn: Was the old man a normal villager?
questions.explanationZh: 腳不沾草地——這樣的人，怎麼可能是普通的村民？答 No，他不是普通人。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的腳沒有碰到池邊濕濕的草地。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Do not cry, child," he said in a very soft voice.
questions.explanationZh: 「孩子，別哭。」他的聲音輕得像一陣風。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: ___ old man in a sky-colored robe stepped down beside her.
questions.sentenceZh: 一個穿著天藍色長袍的老人，走到她身邊，輕輕站定。
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh: old 開頭的音是母音 /oʊ/——母音前面要用 An 喔，不是 A。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "The bones of your fish lie under the heap by the gate."
questions.question: Where were the fish bones?
options: in the pond by the house
under a pile by the gate
on the roof above the door
questions.explanationZh: 老人說埋在「門邊那一堆下面」——就是「門邊那一堆下面」。
questions.sentenceZh: 「妳的魚骨頭，埋在門邊那一堆東西下面。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Hide the 魚骨 (fish-bone). Speak to them. They will give you anything."
questions.explanationZh: 「把魚骨頭藏好，跟它們說話——它們會給妳任何想要的東西。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His feet did not touch the wet grass by the pond.
questions.sentenceZh: 他的腳沒有碰到池邊濕濕的草地。
questions.question: What does this detail tell us about the old man?
questions.explanationZh: 腳不沾草地——這是超自然的表現，說明他「不是普通世界來的」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man said the bones would answer any wish she said out loud.
questions.question: What could the bones do?
questions.explanationZh: 任何想要的都會給——就是「實現她的願望」。
questions.sentenceZh: 老人說，對骨頭說出來的願望，都會實現。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did Yexian do that night?
questions.question: What did Yexian do that night?
questions.explanationZh: 老人說去挖，她就去了——她「把骨頭挖出來」。
questions.sentenceZh: 那天晚上葉限做了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man said the bones would answer any wish she said out loud.
questions.sentenceZh: 老人說，對骨頭說出來的願望，都會實現。
questions.questionEn: Did the bones only work in secret whispers?
questions.explanationZh: 老人說「說出來」的願望都會實現——不用秘密低語。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She wrapped the bones in clean cloth and slid them under her thin mat.
questions.explanationZh: 她用乾淨的布把骨頭包好，小心地塞進薄薄的草蓆下面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A man from the sky told her where to find the bones, and she hid them close to her body.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
optionsZh: 葉限得到一個有魔法的禮物
questions.explanationZh: 老人指路、骨頭有魔力——葉限「得到了一個有魔法的禮物」。
questions.sentenceZh: 一個天上來的老人告訴她骨頭在哪，她把骨頭緊緊貼身收好。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She wrapped the bones in clean cloth and slid them under her thin mat.
questions.sentenceZh: 她用乾淨的布把骨頭包好，小心地塞進薄薄的草蓆下面。
questions.question: Which image matches this moment?
options: hiding a treasure under her mat
tossing the bones in the river
cooking up a pot of soup
questions.explanationZh: 用布包好、塞進草蓆下——就是「把寶貝藏在草蓆下」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She lay on her mat and felt the bones warm under her back. What would she ask first?
questions.explanationZh: 她躺在草蓆上，感覺背下的骨頭暖暖的。她在心裡想：要先許什麼願呢？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A man from the sky told her where to find the bones, and she hid them close to her body.
questions.sentenceZh: 一個天上來的老人告訴她骨頭在哪，她把骨頭緊緊貼身收好。
questions.question: Why did Yexian keep the bones so close?
options: she knew they were precious and powerful
she wanted to cook them later
she was afraid they would get wet
the old man told her to throw them away
optionsZh: 她知道它們珍貴又有魔力
questions.explanationZh: 老人說骨頭能實現願望——她當然知道這東西「珍貴又有魔力」，要緊緊收好。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Do not cry, child," he said in a very soft voice.
questions.sentenceZh: 「孩子，別哭。」他的聲音輕得像一陣風。
questions.questionEn: Was the old man gentle when he spoke to Yexian?
questions.explanationZh: 聲音輕得像風、叫她「孩子」——他說話很溫柔。答 Yes。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She lay on her mat and felt the bones warm under her back.
questions.sentenceZh: 她躺在草蓆上，感覺背下的骨頭暖暖的。
questions.question: What does this warmth suggest?
options: the bones had a kind magic
the mat was old and torn
she had a fever that night
optionsZh: 骨頭有一種善良的魔力
questions.explanationZh: 骨頭是魚的魂留下的，暖暖的感覺說明它們「有善良的魔力」。

storyBeat: 洞節之夜 — 她會被認出嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的故事要認識 4 個字：
🔑 festival = 節
🔑 lantern = 燈籠
🔑 cloak = 披風
🔑 shoe = 鞋
這 4 個字記住，今晚的節慶就好玩了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The 洞節 (cave festival) night came. Lanterns lit up every doorway.
questions.explanationZh: 洞節之夜到了！每個門口都掛起燈籠，整個村子亮了起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each phrase with its Chinese meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 這 4 個片語都是節慶之夜的主角——洞節、藍披風、金鞋、燈籠光。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The new wife and her daughter put on bright clothes and stepped out together.
questions.questionEn: Was Yexian allowed to go with them?
questions.explanationZh: 兩個人一起出門——葉限呢？當然沒帶她。答 No，她不准去。
questions.sentenceZh: 後母和她女兒穿上鮮亮的衣服，一起走出去了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Alone in the cave, Yexian whispered to the bones, "I want to go too."
questions.explanationZh: 葉限一個人待在洞裡，輕輕對骨頭說：「我也想去。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Alone in the cave, Yexian whispered to the bones, "I want to go too."
questions.sentenceZh: 葉限一個人待在洞裡，輕輕對骨頭說：「我也想去。」
questions.question: What does this moment show about Yexian?
options: longing to join in and have joy
questions.explanationZh: 「我也想去」——這幾個字說出了她「渴望參與、渴望快樂」的心情。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In a soft flash, a blue cloak and two small gold shoes lay on the floor.
questions.question: What appeared on the floor?
options: a heavy bag of gold coins
a sharp sword and a shield
optionsZh: 美麗的衣服和亮亮的鞋
questions.explanationZh: 藍披風加金鞋——骨頭給了「美麗的衣服和亮亮的鞋」。
questions.sentenceZh: 輕輕一閃，一件藍色披風和兩隻小小的金鞋，落在地板上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She put them on. The cloak fit her. The shoes felt light as a leaf.
questions.explanationZh: 她穿上披風，合合身身的。金鞋穿上腳，輕得像一片葉子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In a soft flash, a blue cloak and two small gold shoes lay on the floor.
questions.sentenceZh: 輕輕一閃，一件藍色披風和兩隻小小的金鞋，落在地板上。
questions.questionEn: Did the bones grant Yexian's wish right away?
questions.explanationZh: 說完願望，披風和鞋立刻就出現了——骨頭「馬上」就回應了她。答 Yes。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: When she walked into the lantern light, every face in the village turned to her.
questions.question: How did the villagers react?
questions.explanationZh: 每張臉都轉過來——「所有眼睛都跟著她」。
questions.sentenceZh: 她走進燈籠光裡，村子裡每個人的臉都轉向她。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Yexian feel walking through the festival?
questions.question: How did she feel?
questions.explanationZh: 披風合身、鞋輕得像飛，村人都看她——這一刻，她是「驕傲又自在」的。
questions.sentenceZh: 走在節慶裡，葉限心裡是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: When she walked into the lantern light, every face in the village turned to her.
questions.sentenceZh: 她走進燈籠光裡，村子裡每個人的臉都轉向她。
questions.question: Which image matches this moment?
options: Yexian in her cloak through the lanterns
sweeping the cave floor all alone in the dark
hiding quietly behind a stone wall
optionsZh: 葉限穿披風走進燈籠光
questions.explanationZh: 走進燈籠光、披風合身——就是「葉限穿披風走進燈籠光」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She passed shops, music, and stalls of warm sweet food.
questions.explanationZh: 她走過店鋪、走過音樂聲，走過賣著熱騰騰甜食的攤子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yexian, who scrubbed pots that morning, now walked through bright lanterns in a sky-colored cloak.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: a quiet morning by the pond
a fish soup dinner with the family
an old man's visit to the house
questions.explanationZh: 從刷鍋的女孩變成燈籠下最耀眼的人——這就是「葉限在節慶上的蛻變」。
questions.sentenceZh: 早上還在刷鍋碗的葉限，這一刻穿著天藍披風，走在明亮的燈籠裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She put them on. The cloak fit her. The shoes felt light as a leaf.
questions.sentenceZh: 她穿上披風，合合身身的。金鞋穿上腳，輕得像一片葉子。
questions.question: What do these details suggest about the magic gift?
questions.explanationZh: 完全合身、輕得像葉子——這禮物「特別為她做的」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But from across the square, the new wife's daughter slowly lowered her cup of wine...
questions.explanationZh: 但廣場對面，後母的女兒慢慢放下手裡那杯酒……她瞇起眼睛，看著那個背影。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The new wife and her daughter put on bright clothes and stepped out together.
questions.sentenceZh: 後母和她女兒穿上鮮亮的衣服，一起走出去了。
questions.questionEn: Did Yexian leave the cave with the new wife?
questions.explanationZh: 她們兩個一起出門——葉限沒有跟著去。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She passed shops, music, and stalls of warm sweet food.
questions.sentenceZh: 她走過店鋪、走過音樂聲，走過賣著熱騰騰甜食的攤子。
questions.question: What kind of event is happening in the village?
questions.explanationZh: 店鋪、音樂、熱甜食攤子——這是「熱鬧的夜晚節慶」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: From across the square, the new wife's daughter slowly lowered her cup of wine.
questions.sentenceZh: 廣場對面，後母的女兒慢慢放下手裡那杯酒……
questions.questionEn: Was the new wife's daughter surprised by what she saw?
questions.explanationZh: 「慢慢放下酒杯」——這個動作說明她看到了什麼讓她一愣的東西。答 Yes，她嚇到了。

storyBeat: 掉了一隻金鞋 — 鞋會落到誰手上?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚要認識 4 個字：
🔑 point = 指
🔑 fall off = 掉下來
🔑 road = 路
🔑 reach = 到達
這幾個字很實用，一起記起來！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The new wife's daughter pointed across the square. "Mother — she looks like Yexian."
questions.explanationZh: 後母的女兒指著廣場對面，低聲說：「媽——她看起來像葉限。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each phrase with its Chinese meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 這 4 個片語都是這節故事的重點——黑暗的小巷、光著的腳、金鞋、海島國王。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yexian heard the words. She turned and slipped fast into the dark street.
questions.questionEn: Did Yexian want them to see her face?
questions.explanationZh: 聽到後，她轉頭就跑——當然不想被看見！答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 葉限聽到了那句話，轉身快步鑽進黑暗的小巷裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: As she ran, one 金鞋 (gold shoe) fell off her foot onto the road.
questions.explanationZh: 她跑的時候，一隻金鞋「啪」地從腳上掉到路上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yexian heard the words. She turned and slipped fast into the dark street.
questions.sentenceZh: 葉限聽到了那句話，轉身快步鑽進黑暗的小巷裡。
questions.question: Why did Yexian run away?
questions.explanationZh: 聽到「她像葉限」就立刻逃——她「怕被認出來」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She did not stop to pick it up — the voices behind her were too close.
questions.question: Why did she leave the shoe?
questions.explanationZh: 後面的聲音越來越近——是「有人在追她」，沒時間回頭撿。
questions.sentenceZh: 她沒停下來撿——後面的聲音已經太近了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She came home with one bare foot and one tired heart.
questions.explanationZh: 她回到家，一隻腳沒有鞋，心裡也空了一塊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: As she ran, one gold shoe fell off her foot onto the road.
questions.sentenceZh: 她跑的時候，一隻金鞋「啪」地從腳上掉到路上。
questions.questionEn: Did Yexian lose both shoes while running?
questions.explanationZh: 只有一隻金鞋掉下來，不是兩隻。答 No，只掉了一隻。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The shoe lay on the road until a passing man picked it up.
questions.question: Who found the gold shoe?
questions.explanationZh: 路過的男人撿走了——他就是那個「路上的陌生人」。
questions.sentenceZh: 那隻鞋躺在路上，一個路過的男人把它撿起來了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Where did the gold shoe finally reach?
questions.question: Where did the shoe travel to?
questions.explanationZh: 鞋一路輾轉，最後傳到了陀汗國王手上——那就是「一個海島的國王那裡」。
questions.sentenceZh: 那隻金鞋最後到了哪裡？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She came home with one bare foot and one tired heart.
questions.sentenceZh: 她回到家，一隻腳沒有鞋，心裡也空了一塊。
questions.question: Which image matches this moment?
options: Yexian heading home, missing one shoe
hands full of food walking home
optionsZh: 葉限少了一隻鞋走回家
questions.explanationZh: 少了一隻鞋、心裡空了一塊——就是「葉限少了一隻鞋走回家」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The shoe travelled far across hills and water, hand to hand, until it reached a king.
questions.explanationZh: 鞋子越過山、越過水，一手傳一手，最後落到了一個國王的手心裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yexian came home with one shoe missing. Far away, that shoe sat on a king's table.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: the shoe finds a powerful owner
the new wife buys new clothes
a quiet day by the pond
optionsZh: 鞋找到了一個有力量的主人
questions.explanationZh: 鞋落到了國王手上——這段說的是「鞋找到了一個有力量的主人」。
questions.sentenceZh: 葉限少了一隻鞋回到家。遠遠的地方，那隻鞋已經放在一個國王的桌上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The shoe travelled far across hills and water, hand to hand, until it reached a king.
questions.sentenceZh: 鞋子越過山、越過水，一手傳一手，最後落到了一個國王的手心裡。
questions.question: What does this journey of the shoe show?
options: the shoe was meant to reach someone important
the shoe was lost and never found
the new wife sent the shoe to the king
optionsZh: 那隻鞋注定要落到一個重要的人手裡
那隻鞋遺失了、再也沒找到
questions.explanationZh: 越山越水、一手傳一手——這鞋的旅程說明它「注定要落到重要的人手裡」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king lifted the shoe to the light. "I will find the foot that fits this," he said quietly...
questions.explanationZh: 國王把那隻鞋舉到燈光下，輕輕地說：「我要找到能穿上這隻鞋的人。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She did not stop to pick it up — the voices behind her were too close.
questions.sentenceZh: 她沒停下來撿——後面的聲音已經太近了。
questions.questionEn: Did Yexian have enough time to pick up the shoe?
questions.explanationZh: 後面聲音太近、來不及——她沒有時間撿鞋。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king lifted the shoe to the light. "I will find the foot that fits this," he said quietly.
questions.sentenceZh: 國王把那隻鞋舉到燈光下，輕輕地說：「我要找到能穿上這隻鞋的人。」
questions.question: What did the king decide to do?
options: search for the owner of the shoe
sell the shoe at the market
throw the shoe into the sea
give the shoe to his daughter
questions.explanationZh: 「我要找到能穿上這隻鞋的人」——他決定去「找那隻鞋的主人」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The shoe lay on the road until a passing man picked it up.
questions.sentenceZh: 那隻鞋躺在路上，一個路過的男人把它撿起來了。
questions.questionEn: Did Yexian pick up the shoe herself later?
questions.explanationZh: 是路過的男人撿走了，不是葉限回來拿的。答 No。

storyBeat: 國王找到她 — 鞋滑上腳像水

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的故事有 4 個字要認識：
🔑 try = 試
🔑 fit = 合身
🔑 foot = 腳
🔑 stone = 石頭
記住這 4 個字，今晚的結局就好期待了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king tried the gold shoe on every woman he could find.
questions.explanationZh: 國王把那隻金鞋，拿給所有能找到的女子試穿。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each phrase with its Chinese meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 這 4 個片語都是故事結局的重點——金鞋、光著的腳、飛石、善良的國王。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every foot was a little too wide or a little too short.
questions.questionEn: Did any of them fit the shoe?
questions.explanationZh: 不是太寬就是太短——沒有一個人合腳。答 No，沒有人穿得進去。
questions.sentenceZh: 每個人的腳，不是大了一點，就是短了一點。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At last, the king sailed to the cave village in the south.
questions.explanationZh: 最後，國王坐船南下，來到了南方的洞穴村莊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king tried the gold shoe on every woman he could find. Every foot was a little too wide or a little too short.
questions.sentenceZh: 國王把那隻金鞋，拿給所有能找到的女子試穿。每個人的腳，不是大了一點，就是短了一點。
questions.question: What do these details tell us about Yexian?
options: the shoe truly belonged to her
nobody could wear it at all
the shoe was the wrong size
questions.explanationZh: 試遍所有人都不合——說明只有葉限才是那隻鞋「真正的主人」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Quiet, with one bare foot, Yexian stepped out from behind the new wife.
questions.question: How did Yexian come out?
questions.explanationZh: 輕輕的，沒有聲音——她「無聲地走出來」。
questions.sentenceZh: 葉限安安靜靜地，光著一隻腳，從後母身後走了出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: 鞋 (the shoe) slipped onto her foot like clear water.
questions.explanationZh: 那隻金鞋滑上她的腳，就像清水流過，自然又完美。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At last, the king sailed to the cave village in the south.
questions.sentenceZh: 最後，國王坐船南下，來到了南方的洞穴村莊。
questions.questionEn: Did the king give up looking for the owner?
questions.explanationZh: 他沒放棄，坐船去找——他「沒有」放棄。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king saw at once that this was the woman from the festival.
questions.question: How did the king feel?
questions.explanationZh: 一眼就認出來了——國王心裡「又驚又確定」。
questions.sentenceZh: 國王一眼就認出，她就是節慶那晚的女子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the king do for Yexian?
questions.question: What did the king do?
questions.explanationZh: 他帶著她回到自己的島——就是「帶她一起回家」。
questions.sentenceZh: 國王為葉限做了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Quiet, with one bare foot, Yexian stepped out from behind the new wife.
questions.sentenceZh: 葉限安安靜靜地，光著一隻腳，從後母身後走了出來。
questions.question: Which image matches this moment?
options: Yexian, one foot bare, stepping out
running away fast from the king
hiding inside a big wicker basket
dancing joyfully in the lantern light
optionsZh: 葉限光著一隻腳走出來
questions.explanationZh: 安靜、光一隻腳走出來——就是「葉限光著一隻腳走出來」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: That night, 飛石 (flying stones) fell from the sky and buried the new wife and her daughter.
questions.explanationZh: 那天晚上，天上掉下飛石，把後母和她的女兒埋了進去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The girl who lost her fish, her mother, and her shoe now sailed away with a kind king.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: Yexian finds a new safe home
a quiet morning by the pond
optionsZh: 葉限找到一個安全的新家
questions.explanationZh: 辛苦了那麼久的葉限，終於「找到一個安全的新家」了。
questions.sentenceZh: 那個失去了魚、失去了媽媽、也失去了一隻鞋的女孩，如今跟著善良的國王一起出航了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The shoe slipped onto her foot like clear water.
questions.sentenceZh: 那隻金鞋滑上她的腳，就像清水流過，自然又完美。
questions.question: What does this image tell us about the fit?
options: heavy and cold on her foot
questions.explanationZh: 像清水流過——形容它自然又完美，說明「完全為她量身打造」的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: On the boat, Yexian touched the small cloth in her pocket. The bones were warm again...
questions.explanationZh: 在船上，葉限摸了摸口袋裡那塊小布。骨頭，又暖了起來……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king saw at once that this was the woman from the festival.
questions.sentenceZh: 國王一眼就認出，她就是節慶那晚的女子。
questions.questionEn: Did the king need a long time to recognise Yexian?
questions.explanationZh: 「一眼就認出」——他根本不需要多久時間。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: That night, flying stones fell from the sky and buried the new wife and her daughter.
questions.sentenceZh: 那天晚上，天上掉下飛石，把後母和她的女兒埋了進去。
questions.question: What does this event suggest about the story's message?
options: cruelty is punished in the end
the king caused the stones to fall
Yexian asked for the stones to fall
optionsZh: 是國王讓石頭掉下來的
是葉限要求讓石頭掉下來的
questions.explanationZh: 壞人被飛石埋了——故事告訴我們「殘忍最終會受到懲罰」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: On the boat, Yexian touched the small cloth in her pocket. The bones were warm again.
questions.sentenceZh: 在船上，葉限摸了摸口袋裡那塊小布。骨頭，又暖了起來……
questions.questionEn: Did Yexian bring the fish bones with her when she left?
questions.explanationZh: 在船上還摸得到骨頭——她「帶著它們一起走的」。答 Yes。
